features.label: Image Converter
features.desc: Convert JPG ↔ PNG ↔ WebP ↔ BMP ↔ GIF. Resize with aspect ratio lock + presets (1080p, 720p, 512×512 etc). Rotate 90/180/270°, flip H/V, grayscale. Quality slider. Batch convert multiple images. Download sends to browser Downloads panel.
features.howto: DevHub → Image Converter · Drop images → set format/quality/resize → Convert All → Download All
